samples.label: Hex · coded
samples.caption: 203 coded 16-sector rings on a hex lattice — the default ringgrid target. Adaptive multi-scale detection finds every marker and decodes its ID against the 893-word codebook; the fitted homography anchors the board frame.

samples.label: Rect · plain (ISRA 24×24)
samples.caption: 576 plain rings on a 24×24 square lattice with three origin fiducial dots. Plain rings carry no ID, so markers are labeled by lattice coordinate; the origin dots resolve the absolute board frame (drawn in violet).
